title: toona serrata
intro: Toona serrata, also known as Australian cedar, is a native Australian tree species that belongs to the mahogany family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Toona serrata include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. Toona serrata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine to treat various health conditions.
